sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the bottom-right panel now shows:
- Row 1: blue, red, blue
- Row 2: red, center, red
- Row 3: blue, red, blue
This matches the top-right pattern: b, R, b / R, center, R / b, R, b. But the level isn't complete yet.
I've tried matching all three source panels individually, and none of them work. Let me think about what other patterns could be the goal.
Maybe the goal is to create a pattern that's the "sum" or "combination" of the three source panels in some way. Let me think about what unique patterns exist.
The three source panels have these patterns:
1. Top-left: b, R, b / R, center, b / b, R, R
2. Top-right: b, R, b / R, center, R / b, R, b
3. Bottom-left: R, b, b / R, center, R / b, b, R
Let me think about what patterns are possible with 8 cells (excluding center). There are 2^8 = 256 possible patterns. I've tried:
- All 3 source patterns
- XOR of all 3
- Majority vote of all 3
- Flipped bottom-left (which is same as 180° rotation)
Let me try some other combinations:
- All red: R, R, R / R, center, R / R, R, R
- All blue: b, b, b / b, center, b / b, b, b (this is the reset state)
- Diagonal pattern: R, b, b / b, center, b / b, b, R
- Anti-diagonal: b, b, R / b, center, b / R, b, b
- Cross pattern: b, R, b / R, center, R / b, R, b (this is top-right, already tried)
- Corner pattern: R, b, R / b, center, b / R, b, R
- Edge pattern: b, R, b / R, center, R / b, R, b (same as cross)
Actually, wait. Let me look at the image more carefully. The bottom-right panel currently matches the top-right pattern. But the level isn't complete. Maybe I need to do something else after matching the pattern, like clicking on the center or clicking on one of the source panels.
Let me try clicking on the center piece of the bottom-right panel to see if that completes the level.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Bottom-right matches top-right but level not complete.
# Maybe I need to click the center piece to "confirm"?
# Center is roughly at row 46-50, col 46-50
# Let me try clicking the center

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 46, 'col': 46}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
